testcase.name: tests/accountGenerator.test.cjs

failure.message: require() of ES Module /Volumes/SanDisk/repos/liferay-ai-commerce-accelerator/node_modules/rettime/build/index.mjs not supported. Instead change the require of /Volumes/SanDisk/repos/liferay-ai-commerce-accelerator/node_modules/rettime/build/index.mjs to a dynamic import() which is available in all CommonJS modules.
